name: Emilian–Romagnol
notes: Emilian–Romagnol (emiliàn e rumagnòl), a Gallo-Italic language group of northern Italy. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. There is no single accepted orthography — several competing spelling conventions exist per city/variety, and vowel length and the front rounded vowels are written differently in each. Grapheme-to-IPA mapping is therefore variety- and orthography-specific; the Emilian side is tracked separately as `egl`. Glottolog: `eml` covers Emilian + Romagnol jointly, so the code is necessarily the `emil1243` family node; the language-level languoids are `emil1241` (Emilian, ISO `egl`) and `roma1328` (Romagnol, ISO `rgn`).
